message:
test(proptest): expand connector_testbed property tests to 41 (linter additions)

Added 16 tests: deterministic seed reproducibility, factory method contracts,
constructor invariants (outage intensity 100, flood clamping, sandbox probe statics),
display snake_case format, online toggle cycle, default values, and received=success+failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
